this website

you're looking at it! built with astro + svelte. source is on github.

☆

project two

something cool you made. describe it however you want.

project three

another thing. maybe it's weird. that's fine.

project four

/* about me */

bio.txt

hey! i'm silky. i make things on the internet because it's fun. this site is my little home page — a place to collect my projects, thoughts, and links to cool stuff.

i believe the web should be weird, personal, and expressive. corporate minimalism is boring. let's make cool stuff.

now.txt

☆ currently building this very website
☆ learning new things every day
☆ browsing the indie web
☆ probably should be sleeping

likes.txt

making websites ✦ open source ✦ late night coding ✦ cool color palettes ✦ monospace fonts ✦ webrings ✦ the small web ✦ creative coding

← prev ✦ webring ✦ next →
